description: Discover IPOGrid companies and active deals with cursor pagination and market, issuer-kind, freshness, or proceeds filters. Use get_company after selecting an issuer. Anonymous requests return at most 10 rows and omit consensus enrichment.

description.name: get_company
description.description: Fetch one issuer by SEC CIK after discovery with list_companies. Optional enrichments add terms and research context; anonymous requests allow only latest_terms, classification, and news.

description.name: list_news
description.description: List recent IPO-company news, optionally filtered by SEC CIK. Use this for a news feed; use get_company with news for broader issuer context. Anonymous requests return at most 10 rows and omit full content.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "get_chart" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "(hash c104ea29)" → after: "Build an aggregated IPO chart and return its data plus canonical embed, page, and API URLs. Use this instead of hand-building chart URLs. Anonymous requests are quota-limited and may clamp a 52-week range to 26 weeks or a daily bucket to weekly unless the explicit date window is at most 31 days."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
